title: crocodeilanthe elegans
side_effects: Crocodeilanthe elegans can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant may lead to liver damage, headaches, and dizziness due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can result in seizures, coma, and even death. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
